mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HCNC.HTML_P1(P1, P2, P3) VALUES (#{P1}, #{P2}, #{P3})
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONT, WRITER, MODIFIER, REG_DT, MOD_DT, 1 AS CHK FROM HCNC.HCNC_BOARD WHERE 1=1
SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE, CONT, WRITER, MODIFIER, REG_DT, MOD_DT FROM HCNC.HCNC_BOARD WHERE 1=1 AND BOARD_NO=#{boardNo}

SELECT CODE , CODE_NM FROM HCNC.COM_CD_MST WHERE 1=1
AND ( CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%') OR CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%') )
AND CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%')
AND CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchVal}, '%')

SELECT PT_CODE ,CODE ,CODE_NM FROM HCNC.COM_CD_DTL WHERE 1=1
AND ( CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValDtl}, '%') OR CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValDtl}, '%') )
AND CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValDtl}, '%')
AND CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValDtl}, '%')
AND PT_CODE = #{ptCode}
SELECT PT_CODE , CODE , CODE_NM FROM HCNC.COM_CD_DTL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HCNC.HCNC_BOARD(TITLE, CONT, WRITER, MODIFIER, BOARD_TYPE, CATEGORY) VALUES (#{TITLE}, #{CONT}, #{WRITER}, #{MODIFIER}, #{BOARD_TYPE_NM}, #{CATEGORY_NM})
INSERT INTO HCNC.COM_CD_DTL(PT_CODE, CODE, CODE_NM) VALUES (#{PT_CODE}, #{CODE}, #{CODE_NM})
mapper.update: UPDATE HCNC.HCNC_BOARD SET TITLE=#{TITLE}, CONT=#{CONT}, MODIFIER=#{MODIFIER}, MOD_DT=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), BOARD_TYPE=#{BOARD_TYPE_NM}, CATEGORY=#{CATEGORY_NM} WHERE BOARD_NO=#{BOARD_NO}

UPDATE HCNC.HCNC_BOARD SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_NO IN
#{boardNo}
